mean_cn: v.对照，对比（读作/kənˈtræst/）；  n.对照，对比
mean_en: a difference between two or more people or things that you can see clearly when they are compared or put close together; the fact of comparing two or more things in order to show the differences between them; a person or thing that is clearly different from somebody/something else
sentence: The picture contrasts youth and age.
sentence_trans: 这幅图对比了青春和老年。
word_etyma: contra相反 + st站 → 站在对立面 → contrast对比
